name: Russ Feingold
subject: Our two big milestones
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
We reached them both. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf431f/1c469400/69e6ed7/3565b26/1352047337/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-01_eom-ty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-01_eom-ty_nd&utm_campaign=eom-ty&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I want to thank you personally for your support. Yesterday, I told you we had two big milestones -- I'm proud to report we reached them both: **We met our end-of-May goal of raising $50,000, and I dropped off the maximum number of signatures allowed to get my name on the ballot, including supporters from all 72 counties** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf431f/1c469400/69e6ed7/3565b26/1352047337/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-01_eom-ty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-01_eom-ty_nd&utm_campaign=eom-ty&utm_medium=ema") It was your hard work that made this happen. Because of your support, here's what we've accomplished:
* We've visited all of Wisconsin's 72 counties -- TWICE.
* We've met every grassroots fundraising goal we've ever set, and, to date, more than 30,000 Wisconsinites have made donations.
* As of this afternoon, I'm officially on the ballot. Right after today's rally in Madison, supporters helped me bring nomination signatures up the block to the Government Accountability Board to make it official.

This campaign is powered by you, and so many supporters like you across the country. I'm so proud of what we've accomplished together. Thank you. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf431f/1c469400/69e6ed7/3565b26/1352047337/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-june?utm_source=ema_2016-06-01_eom-ty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-01_eom-ty_nd&utm_campaign=eom-ty&utm_medium=ema")

name: Karen Pence
subject: Hoosier Education Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for Indiana
body:
As a teacher, and as Mike’s wife for 30 years, I can tell you that education is one of his top priorities. In fact, in our new ad that hit the airwave
---
| [](http://links.mikepence.com/u/52cbcc1001a54ad49cf656e099ad3c58?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=education&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160602-hoosier-education-survey-3611-survey-mc) |
| Friend, **As a teacher, and as Mike’s wife for 30 years, I can tell you that education is one of his top priorities.** In fact, in our new ad that hit the airwaves this week, we’re telling Hoosiers across the state just how much Mike values education. You can watch it below. |
| [](http://links.mikepence.com/u/18d04dd7311e493eb52b6cf18a8a00f2?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&v=QuHSTj7oEvg)
| Mike has provided the largest increase in spending in history for our children’s schools, implemented the first ever Hoosier Pre-K program to help children get a jump-start on life, and has provided more parents the opportunity to choose the right school for their child.

**When you invest in education like Mike has, you see results.** Our test scores are up, our graduation rates are up, and our students are really beginning to excel.

But he won’t settle for status quo. Mike wants to continue to improve and continue to make Indiana education a model for the nation. And with your help, we can keep moving forward and keep Indiana growing.

That is why we wanted to reach out to you. **What do you think should be our focus as we continue to support and improve Indiana schools?** |
| [Improve School Technology](http://links.mikepence.com/u/6b96ea23ce62433b939749e53816aa7c?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=tech&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_1&utm_term=education&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160602-hoosier-education-survey-3611-survey-mc) |
| [Replace ISTEP](http://links.mikepence.com/u/c1d6aace263b4661a0ec02ae8bdd811a?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=istep&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_2&utm_term=education&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160602-hoosier-education-survey-3611-survey-mc) |
| [Reward Great Teachers](http://links.mikepence.com/u/d0fe1a2fee1e4e21ab153914d5dbe9ea?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=teacher&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_3&utm_term=education&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160602-hoosier-education-survey-3611-survey-mc) |
| [Expand School Choice](http://links.mikepence.com/u/b772fdbdb99c41eb85b746e1ad3c9048?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=choice&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_4&utm_term=education&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160602-hoosier-education-survey-3611-survey-mc) |
| Thank you,
Karen Pence |

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: New California poll
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
When you wake up on June 8, the morning after California and five other states vote, will you be able to say that you did everything you could to help Bernie win?
Because right now in California, it's very, very, very close.
**California Primary Poll (NBC News)**
Hillary Clinton: 49%
Bernie Sanders: 47%
This is important: the same poll says that with a higher turnout, we are actually winning. And if we win California, it will send the STRONGEST message possible to the Democratic establishment heading into the convention in July. That's why we have to ask you to help in two ways:
**[Yes, I'll make some calls this weekend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160602-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160602-full")** **[I'll Contribute to
help win California](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-california?refcode=em160602-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-california?refcode=em160602-full")**
How else do we know it's going to be a nail biter in California? Secretary Clinton knows it's close too - she's canceling events in New Jersey and is racing to California to campaign. (She kept her big-dollar fundraisers on the schedule though.)
We have elections happening in New Jersey, New Mexico, North Dakota, South Dakota, and Montana on Tuesday night, in addition to California. We think we can do very well across the board, and we need you to do everything in your power to help us win.
Why? Because every vote, every delegate, and every state that we win gives us power at the Democratic convention, and victory is the strongest message we can send to the political establishment.
Are you in to help Bernie win?
**Yes,[I can volunteer to call voters in California and other upcoming states this weekend.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160602-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160602-full")**
**Yes,[I can contribute $3 to Bernie 2016 to help win California and other states on Tuesday.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-california?refcode=em160602-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-california?refcode=em160602-full")**
Let's win on Tuesday.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-california?refcode=em160602-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-california?refcode=em160602-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Gina Bonaminio
subject: Rob is making a difference
body:
| Peter -- My name is Gina Bonaminio, and I am a recovering heroin addict. I started drinking when I was 11. I eventually moved on to prescription drugs, and by the time I was 18, I was using heroin.

I have been sober for the past 2 years and 8 months. However, too many Ohioans face a far different fate in battling the disease of addiction. Prescription drug and heroin abuse is an epidemic in our state, and more than 25 Ohioans die each week from drug overdoses.

As a recovering addict, I know that Rob Portman is making a difference. His legislation will save lives and help people get the treatment they need to get their lives back on track.

Rob Portman is bringing Republicans and Democrats together and giving hope to families struggling with addiction. We need to keep him in the Senate so he can keep fighting for us. [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dv1c2v-rp2j0%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gina_blast&n=1)[
](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dv1c2v-rp2j0%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gina_blast&n=2 "Watch
Wildfire")I hope you will watch the Portman campaign’s first TV ads "[Wildfire](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DYEK-HTrGr9k%2520&e=a06ce8c820e612cf0be0bed86f43cd75f59e4577&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=16&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gina_blast&n=3)," "[Tyler](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D__-9es2TdGc%26feature%3Dyoutu.be%2520&e=a06ce8c820e612cf0be0bed86f43cd75f59e4577&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=17&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gina_blast&n=4)," and "[Gina](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dv1c2v-rp2j0%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=a06ce8c820e612cf0be0bed86f43cd75f59e4577&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=18&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gina_blast&n=5)," and learn more about my story and Rob’s efforts to help those struggling with addiction get on the road to recovery. Sincerely, Gina Bonaminio [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gina_blast&n=6) [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gina_blast&n=7)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gina_blast&n=8)

subject: We Need Your Help
body:
| | | Support Phil's Campaign Today!
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=03901675b9&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| Greetings,
---
| **Phil’s opponent is desperate to gain traction. But instead of focusing on the issues that matter to Vermonters, he has resorted to****negative, D.C.- style campaign tactics. For example, in his two most recent fliers and latest TV ad, our opponent has planted lies and falsehoods about Phil’s reputation in hopes they will take root. **

We need to spread the truth. Help us fight back by making a [**_contribution today_**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c94ccfa092&e=19cebfe173)!

**We know Phil is a man of integrity, who has always put the needs of Vermonters first. **[**_Phil has a clear record_**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3a9dd61811&e=19cebfe173) of fighting to make Vermont more affordable, doing what’s right, and holding state government accountable – especially while serving as the only Republican statewide official.

It hasn’t been easy, but together with the 61 other Republican legislators, Phil has worked to block numerous pieces of irresponsible legislation. **Phil is consistently the voice of reason opposing Governor Shumlin’s unrealistic proposals. Phil has repeatedly raised concerns over Vermont Health Connect, continues to be a strong voice against the carbon tax, and defends Vermont’s small businesses against new mandates and legislation that increases taxes and fees. It’s been a hard-fought battle against a super majority and Phil is running for Governor because he has proven he can continue to take on the challenge. **

It’s clear our opponent is afraid to run an honest campaign. He knows** Phil is the candidate who best understands the perspective of working families and the burden of Vermont's growing affordability crisis.** This is why our opponent has resorted to Washington-style politics that twist Phil’s hard work as a local small-business owner and honest efforts on behalf of Vermonters into a false, negative attack.

Vermonters will not be fooled by these misleading accusations and mischaracterizations of Phil’s record. These blatant political tactics do not represent our Vermont values. This is not surprising from an opponent who has spent more than 4 decades on Wall Street, while Phil has been serving our state.

**These attacks are desperate, and not the way we conduct ourselves in Vermont**. [**_Can you make a donation today of $100, $50 or $25 to reject these Washington and Wall Street tactics?_**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5b84c6efd0&e=19cebfe173)

Phil is a leader that has worked diligently to fight for us. He is proud of the work he has accomplished as a small business owner, State Senator and as Lt. Governor – and we’re proud of that too!

**Can you help Phil wage a campaign that’s focused on growing a strong, healthy economy that expands the middle class, lifts wages, and attracts working families, entrepreneurs and new jobs?** We’ll need your help to raise substantial financial resources to fight this smear campaign. [**_Will you make a contribution today?_**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2965c429f2&e=19cebfe173)

Sincerely,
Brittney Wilson
Campaign Coordinator

name: Donna Edwards
subject: Send these three progressives to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Friend,
I've identified as a Democrat since I was 14 because I could see myself in our party.
Shirley Chisholm, Barbara Jordan, Bella Abzug. Powerful women leaders who dared to be catalysts of change for their communities.
As we stand on the shoulders of these giants, we cannot simply echo the call for a more diverse, reflective democracy -- **we must do all we can to deliver it.**
[**That's why I'm fighting for Zephyr Teachout, Lucy Flores, and Pramila Jayapal to go Congress -- progressive candidates who will bring the voices of women, people of color, and the middle class to the decision-making table. Will you join me?**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff48/767134fb/5c3b0627/43381a38/1503065779/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pccc_2016_candidates_donnaedwards/?refcode=donnaedwards&recurring=24&amount=10")
[**Zephyr Teachout**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff48/767134fb/5c3b0627/43381a38/1503065779/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pccc_2016_candidates_donnaedwards/?refcode=donnaedwards&recurring=24&amount=10") is a respected academic and veteran progressive activist. She's standing-up to Wall Street and big money special interests to put people first.
[**Lucy Flores**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff48/767134fb/5c3b0627/43381a38/1503065779/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pccc_2016_candidates_donnaedwards/?refcode=donnaedwards&recurring=24&amount=10") knows what it means to struggle. She fought her way to become Nevada's first Latina state legislator and is an unapologetic champion for reproductive freedom.
[**Pramila Jayapal**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff48/767134fb/5c3b0627/43381a38/1503065779/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pccc_2016_candidates_donnaedwards/?refcode=donnaedwards&recurring=24&amount=10") immigrated to the U.S. at 16, becoming a movement leader and state senator dedicated to racial justice and the fight for healthcare as a right, not just a privilege for the wealthy.
Their perspectives and experiences are not heard enough in America's elected bodies. It's time to change that.
[**Send a contribution to give Zephyr Teachout, Lucy Flores, and Pramila Jayapa the resources it takes to win.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff48/767134fb/5c3b0627/43381a38/1503065779/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pccc_2016_candidates_donnaedwards/?refcode=donnaedwards&recurring=24&amount=10")
Thank you for being a part of this,
Donna

Powerful women leaders who dared to be catalysts of change for their communities. As we stand on the shoulders of these giants, we cannot simply echo the call for a more diverse, reflective democracy -- we must do all we can to deliver it. "" "" is a respected academic and veteran progressive activist. She's standing-up to Wall Street and big money special interests to put people first. "" knows what it means to struggle. She fought her way to become Nevada's first Latina state legislator and is an unapologetic champion for reproductive freedom. "" immigrated to the U.S. at 16, becoming a movement leader and state senator dedicated to racial justice and the fight for healthcare as a right, not just a privilege for the wealthy. Their perspectives and experiences are not heard enough in America's elected bodies. It's time to change that. "" Thank you for being a part of this, Donna
